title: Remove Sleep
description: A simple jar mod that removes the sleep mechanic from Minecraft b1.7.3 while keeping the ability to reset your spawn point.
body:
A simple mod that removes the sleep mechanic from Minecraft b1.7.3 while keeping the ability to reset your spawn point.

_**Modloader not required but I had to select an API.**_
To install, just add ve.class to your minecraft.jar file.
